name: t14-base-convert
prompt: The test suite references App.BaseConverter.ToBase(int n, int b), which isn't implemented yet, so the build currently fails. Create src/App/BaseConverter.cs with `public static string ToBase(int n, int b)` so the whole test suite passes. It converts the non-negative integer n into its representation in base b (2..16), using lowercase digits 0-9 then a-f for 10-15 (e.g. ToBase(255,16) -> "ff"). ToBase(0, b) returns "0". Throw ArgumentOutOfRangeException when n is negative or when b is outside 2..16. Do not modify the existing tests.
